title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Walmart India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Walmart India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Walmart India in Chandigarh is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Walmart India:
Walmart India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Walmart India!
